---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
toc: true
---

::: {.callout-tip}
## Download
You can download a PDF version of my CV [here](cv.pdf) (updated 2024).
:::

---

## Education

<div class="cv-section">
<div class="cv-item">
<div class="cv-details">
  <h4>Ph.D. in Computer Science</h4>
  <p>University Name · Advisor: Prof. Firstname Lastname</p>
  <p>Dissertation: <em>TBD</em></p>
</div>
<div class="cv-year">2022 – Present</div>
</div>

<div class="cv-item">
<div class="cv-details">
  <h4>B.S. in Computer Science (Honors)</h4>
  <p>University Name · GPA: 4.0/4.0</p>
</div>
<div class="cv-year">2018 – 2022</div>
</div>
</div>

---

## Experience

<div class="cv-section">
<div class="cv-item">
<div class="cv-details">
  <h4>Research Intern</h4>
  <p>Company / Lab Name · Mentors: Name, Name</p>
  <p>Worked on distributed systems security and anomaly detection at scale.</p>
</div>
<div class="cv-year">Summer 2023</div>
</div>

<div class="cv-item">
<div class="cv-details">
  <h4>Software Engineering Intern</h4>
  <p>Company Name</p>
  <p>Designed and shipped a feature for real-time network monitoring.</p>
</div>
<div class="cv-year">Summer 2021</div>
</div>
</div>

---

## Publications

See the [Publications](publications.qmd) page for a full list.

---

## Awards & Honors

<div class="cv-section">
<div class="cv-item">
<div class="cv-details">
  <h4>Graduate Fellowship</h4>
  <p>Fellowship Name</p>
</div>
<div class="cv-year">2022</div>
</div>

<div class="cv-item">
<div class="cv-details">
  <h4>Best Paper Award</h4>
  <p>Workshop on Systems and Security</p>
</div>
<div class="cv-year">2023</div>
</div>
</div>

---

## Teaching

<div class="cv-section">
<div class="cv-item">
<div class="cv-details">
  <h4>Teaching Assistant — CS 101: Introduction to Computer Science</h4>
  <p>University Name</p>
</div>
<div class="cv-year">Fall 2022</div>
</div>

<div class="cv-item">
<div class="cv-details">
  <h4>Teaching Assistant — CS 445: Computer Networks</h4>
  <p>University Name</p>
</div>
<div class="cv-year">Spring 2023</div>
</div>
</div>

---

## Service

- **Program Committee Member:** Workshop on ML for Systems (2024)
- **Reviewer:** IEEE Transactions on Network and Service Management (2023–present)
- **Volunteer:** ACM SIGCOMM (2023), USENIX Security (2024)

---

## Skills

| Area | Technologies |
|------|-------------|
| Languages | Python, Go, Rust, C/C++, R |
| Systems | Linux, Docker, Kubernetes |
| ML/Data | PyTorch, scikit-learn, Pandas, Spark |
| Tools | Git, LaTeX, Quarto |
